roles.title: XR prototyper and interaction tinkerer
roles.description: I build AR, WebXR, and spatial interaction projects with a focus on making them clear, useful, and fun to use.

roles.title: Faculty for AR and VR
roles.description: I teach AR and VR in academic settings, helping students think through ideas, tools, and what it takes to actually build something meaningful.

roles.title: Co-founded XDG and co-lead XDG Mumbai
roles.description: I spend a lot of time building community spaces where XR people can meet, share work, learn from each other, and grow together.
roles.note: XDG Mumbai / meetups / workshops / ecosystem building

roles.title: Somewhere between creator, mentor, and scene glue
roles.description: A lot of what I do is about connecting people, ideas, and opportunities across creative work, learning, and the larger XR scene.

featured.title: AR Home Automation
featured.summary: A smart-home prototype that tries to make AR feel genuinely useful instead of just flashy.

featured.title: Phygital ARcade
featured.summary: A phygital play experiment where screen energy and physical interaction bounce off each other nicely.

featured.title: 3D Product Showcase
featured.summary: A more tactile way to show off products with movement, depth, and just enough drama.

featured.title: Launch 360 Zones
featured.summary: Launch spaces built to feel cinematic without becoming confusing or heavy.

featured.title: Product Features Games
featured.summary: Interactive explainers where product education and play sit in the same room.

featured.title: Educational
featured.summary: Educational formats that explain more clearly without losing the fun.

recent.title: Location Based
recent.summary: Work that depends on place, movement, and the feeling of being there.

recent.title: Custom Try On
recent.summary: Try-on experiments that lean into charm, novelty, and a little bit of swagger.

recent.title: Branded Games
recent.summary: Branded play formats built to make products feel memorable without becoming too ad-like.

recent.title: Fiction To Reality
recent.summary: Concepts that start a bit dreamy and end up feeling surprisingly real.

recent.title: Festive Games
recent.summary: Quick festive game loops made to feel cheerful, replayable, and easy to ship.

recent.title: Rewards Reveal
recent.summary: Tiny reveal moments for rewards, surprises, and satisfying payoff.

tools.title: LS WebAR Publisher
tools.description: A publishing helper built to make Lens Studio to WebAR workflows less annoying.

tools.title: Skybox Generator
tools.description: A quick way to build spatial backdrops without wrestling the setup every time.

tools.title: Dynalinks
tools.description: A small utility for making links and campaign routing feel a bit smarter.

tools.title: Kustom MakQR
tools.description: A QR maker for when default generators feel too plain and too limiting.

tools.title: Blueprint 3D
tools.description: A 3D-first helper for figuring out how an experience should actually take shape.

tools.title: Media Helper
tools.description: A helper tool for media tasks that keep showing up in immersive workflows.

tools.title: AirMusic
tools.description: A playful audio interaction build that sits between utility and experiment.

tools.title: SkyHi
tools.description: A lightweight spatial side project with a product-tool feel.
